lyrics.text: 制作：GALA
Sunday's coming I wanna drive my car
lyrics.translation: 星期天来临了，我要开着我的汽车

lyrics.text: To your apartment with the present like a star
lyrics.translation: 像明星般，带着礼物，来到你的公寓

lyrics.text: Forecaster said the weathers may be rainy hard
lyrics.translation: 天气预报说天气糟透了

lyrics.text: But I know the sun will shine for us
lyrics.translation: 但是太阳会为我们闪耀

lyrics.text: Oh lazy seagull fly me from the dark
lyrics.translation: 喔~慵懒的海鸥引领我走向光明

lyrics.text: I dress my jeans and feed my monkey banana
lyrics.translation: 穿上我的牛仔裤，（俚语）把钱塞满口袋

lyrics.text: Then I think my age how old,skyline how far
lyrics.translation: 我想到，我有多大，地平线有多远

lyrics.text: We need each other in California
lyrics.translation: 喔~在加州我们需要彼此

lyrics.text: You show me your body before night comes down
lyrics.translation: 夜幕降临前你向我展示你诱人的身姿

lyrics.text: I touch your face and promise to stay ever young
lyrics.translation: 我抚摸你的脸颊，许下永远像年轻时爱你的诺言

lyrics.text: On this ivory beach we kissed so long
lyrics.translation: 我们深情拥吻在这象牙色的海滩

lyrics.text: It seems that the passion's never gone
lyrics.translation: 仿佛激情永不逝

lyrics.text: You sing me your melody and I feel so please
lyrics.translation: 你为我哼唱你的曲子，幸福感冲昏了我的脑袋

lyrics.text: I want you to want me to keep your dream
lyrics.translation: 我希望你也让我永远怀揣你的梦想

lyrics.text: Together we'll run wild by a summer symphony
lyrics.translation: 在夏夜的交响乐中我们狂野的奔跑

lyrics.text: This is what we enjoyed not a fantasy
lyrics.translation: 我们享受的不再是幻想

lyrics.text: The tin-man's surfing I wanna try my luck
lyrics.translation: 我想去冲浪

lyrics.text: To the top of tide rip like just have some sex
lyrics.translation: 在浪尖舞动就像吃了药药一样

lyrics.text: I know you have no blame for my proud moonish heart
lyrics.translation: 你不会责备我骄傲易变的心

lyrics.text: Welcome to the golden beatnik park
lyrics.translation: 欢迎来到披头士乐园

lyrics.text: Oh diamond seashore drag me from the yard
lyrics.translation: 钻石般的海岸指引我园外风光

lyrics.text: Incredible sunward I watch as you're in photograph
lyrics.translation: 你为这动人的景色添姿加彩

lyrics.text: For camera your smile's so sweet,palm trees' so lush
lyrics.translation: 对着镜头，你笑的如此的甜，就像棕榈树青翠欲滴

lyrics.text: Would you believe my honey it's California
lyrics.translation: 亲爱的，你会相信我吗，这就是加州

lyrics.text: You show me your body before night comes down
lyrics.translation: 夜幕降临前你向我展示你诱人的身姿

lyrics.text: I touch your face and promise to stay ever young
lyrics.translation: 我抚摸你的脸颊，许诺我们永远这样年轻

lyrics.text: On this ivory beach we kissed so long
lyrics.translation: 我们深情拥吻在这象牙色的海滩

lyrics.text: It seems that the passion's never gone
lyrics.translation: 仿佛激情永不逝

lyrics.text: You sing me your melody and I feel so please
lyrics.translation: 你为我哼唱你的曲子，幸福感冲昏了我的脑袋

lyrics.text: I want you to want me to keep your dream
lyrics.translation: 我希望你也让我永远怀揣你的梦想

lyrics.text: Together we'll run wild by a summer symphony
lyrics.translation: 在夏夜的交响乐中我们狂野的奔跑

lyrics.text: This is what we enjoyed not a fantasy
lyrics.translation: 我们享受的不再是幻想
